body.content:
Best Tokyo Luxury Hotels 2026
Tokyo's luxury hotels are among the best in the world. How do you choose one? Here is my list of the best luxury hotels in Tokyo, all personally inspected.
![Luxurious double guest room in the Mandarin Oriental hotel, Tokyo, Japan](https://photos.smugmug.com/photos/i-2r8H3tv/0/bce09ecf/L/i-2r8H3tv-L.jpg "Luxurious double guest room in the Mandarin Oriental hotel, Tokyo, Japan")
Mandarin Oriental Tokyo
Tokyo is packed with first-class luxury hotels. I've inspected all the hotels listed here. I've ranked them based on quality, location, service and price. These are listed in order of preference. Be sure to check my [Where to Stay in Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/where-to-stay-in-tokyo/) page before deciding where to stay.
![View from the bathroom of a double guest room in the Palace Hotel Tokyo, Japan, with city views outside the window](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='600'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20600'%3E%3C/svg%3E "View from the bathroom of a double guest room in the Palace Hotel Tokyo, Japan, with city views outside the window")
Palace Hotel Tokyo guest room
## [Palace Hotel Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/palace-hotel-tokyo/) ([Imperial Palace Area](https://trulytokyo.com/tokyo-imperial-palace-and-around/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/palace-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=569164&tag=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels))
A classic hotel with impeccable service and magnificent views right over the Imperial Palace. It’s arguably the best hotel in Japan.
![A large double bed and commanding views over the city from a Mandarin Oriental Tokyo corner room in Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='533'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20533'%3E%3C/svg%3E "A large double bed and commanding views over the city from a Mandarin Oriental Tokyo corner room in Japan")
Mandarin Oriental Tokyo corner room
## [Mandarin Oriental Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/mandarin-oriental-tokyo-tokyo-station-marunouchi-district-tokyo/) ([Tokyo Station Area](https://trulytokyo.com/tokyo-station-and-marunouchi/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mandarin-oriental-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=69302&tag=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels))
This sublime sanctuary in the sky is nearly perfect in every way. We like the Nihombashi location, which is within walking distance of Tokyo Station.
![Large and luxurious twin beds in a lavishly decorated guest room in the Tokyo Station Hotel, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='533'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20533'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Large and luxurious twin beds in a lavishly decorated guest room in the Tokyo Station Hotel, Japan")
Tokyo Station Hotel guest room
## [Tokyo Station Hotel](https://trulytokyo.com/tokyo-station-hotel-tokyo/) ([Tokyo Station Area](https://trulytokyo.com/tokyo-station-and-marunouchi/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/tokyo-station.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=305312&tag=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels))
Directly above Tokyo Station, this old world hotel is superbly welcoming and comfortable. And it costs less than many other hotels in this class.
![Large double bed, comfortable living area, and wall-length windows with expanisve city views in a Peninsula Tokyo hotel guest room, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='450'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20450'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Large double bed, comfortable living area, and wall-length windows with expanisve city views in a Peninsula Tokyo hotel guest room, Japan")
Peninsula Tokyo guest room
## [The Peninsula Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/peninsula-tokyo-tokyo-station-marunouchi-district-tokyo/) ([Tokyo Station Area](https://trulytokyo.com/tokyo-station-and-marunouchi/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-peninsula-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=497719&tag=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels))
Brilliant location, rooms, facilities and service put this near the top of the Tokyo luxury hotel list. It's just about in a tie for the top spot. My consulting clients love this place.
![Traditional Japanese elements with sofa and large twin beds in the Hotel Ryumeikan Ochanomizu Honten, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='533'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20533'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Traditional Japanese elements with sofa and large twin beds in the Hotel Ryumeikan Ochanomizu Honten, Tokyo, Japan")
Ryumeikan Ochanomizu guest room
## [Hotel Ryumeikan Ochanomizu Honten](https://trulytokyo.com/hotel-ryumeikan-ochanomizu-honten-tokyo/) ([Ochanomizu](https://trulytokyo.com/akihabara-kanda-and-jimbocho/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ryumeikan-ochanomizu-honten.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=626110&tag=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels))
This quiet and intimate boutique hotel may not have the most convenient location, but it’s that’s a selling point for those who don’t like crowds.
![Traditional-style living area with large sofa and television and big double sleeping area behind in The Ritz-Carlton hotel Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='533'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20533'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Traditional-style living area with large sofa and television and big double sleeping area behind in The Ritz-Carlton hotel Tokyo, Japan")
Ritz-Carlton guest room
## [The Ritz-Carlton Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/ritz-carlton-tokyo/) ([Roppongi](https://trulytokyo.com/roppongi-and-akasaka/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-ritz-carlton-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=626318&tag=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels))
The Ritz is a superb hotel and the views from the rooms are among the best in the city. And, it's in the heart of Roppongi.
##
Check Hotel Availability
###
Destination
#### Check-in date
#### Check-out date
![Booking.com](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='150'%20height='0'%20viewBox='0%200%20150%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![Large hotel corner room with double bed, expansive living area and windows looking out over the city in the Shangri La, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='533'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20533'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Large hotel corner room with double bed, expansive living area and windows looking out over the city in the Shangri La, Tokyo, Japan")
Shangri La guest room
## [Shangri La Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/shangri-la-hotel-tokyo/) ([Tokyo Station Area](https://trulytokyo.com/tokyo-station-and-marunouchi/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/shangri-la-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=148855&tag=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels))
Such a beautiful hotel in such a convenient spot! It’s just steps from Tokyo Station! This hotel gets everything right.
![Broad double bed with desk area and window easy chair overlooking the Tokyo skyline at dusk in a Grand Hyatt hotel guest room](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='450'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20450'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Broad double bed with desk area and window easy chair overlooking the Tokyo skyline at dusk in a Grand Hyatt hotel guest room")
Grand Hyatt guest room
## [Grand Hyatt Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/grand-hyatt-tokyo/) ([Roppongi](https://trulytokyo.com/roppongi-and-akasaka/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/grand-hyatt-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=2081617&tag=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels))
For easy access to nightlife, dining and shopping, this superb hotel in Roppongi cannot be beaten.
![Large suite-like guest room in the Cerulean Tower hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with wide double bed and comfortable living area, separated by a screen](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='533'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20533'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Large suite-like guest room in the Cerulean Tower hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with wide double bed and comfortable living area, separated by a screen")
Cerulean Tower guest room
## [Cerulean Tower Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/cerulean-tower-tokyu-hotel-tokyo/) ([Shibuya](https://trulytokyo.com/shibuya/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/cerulean-tower-tokyu.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=1963&tag=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels))
Prices way below others in this list make the Cerulean Tower in Shibuya one of the best-value luxury hotels in the city.
![Stylish twin room with large beds in the Conrad Tokyo hotel, Japan, with window seating area and nighttime views of the water](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='533'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20533'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Stylish twin room with large beds in the Conrad Tokyo hotel, Japan, with window seating area and nighttime views of the water")
Conrad guest room
## [Conrad Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/conrad-tokyo/) ([Shiodome](https://trulytokyo.com/shimbashi-shiodome-hamamatsucho-and-shinagawa/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/conrad-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=69184&tag=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels))
With eye-popping views over Tokyo Bay, the Conrad is an excellent hotel with a great location.
![Elegant suite in the Westin Tokyo hotel with chaise longue in separate living area and sky high views over the city](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='533'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20533'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Elegant suite in the Westin Tokyo hotel with chaise longue in separate living area and sky high views over the city")
Westin Tokyo suite
## [The Westin Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/the-westin-tokyo/) ([Ebisu](https://trulytokyo.com/ebisu-daikanyama-and-meguro/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-westin-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=195906&tag=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels))
Towering over the hip district of Ebisu and very convenient to the Yamanote Line (Tokyo loop line), this excellent hotel is much cheaper than other luxury hotels in the city.
![The garden on a sunny day at the Hotel New Otani Tokyo Executive House Zen with trees and goldfish in the waterfall pond](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='534'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20534'%3E%3C/svg%3E "The garden on a sunny day at the Hotel New Otani Tokyo Executive House Zen with trees and goldfish in the waterfall pond")
New Otani garden and waterfall
## [Hotel New Otani Tokyo Executive House Zen](https://trulytokyo.com/hotel-new-otani-tokyo-executive-house-zen/) ([Akasaka](https://trulytokyo.com/roppongi-and-akasaka/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/new-otani-executive-house-zen.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=1031876&tag=TT_Best_Tokyo_Luxury_Hotels))
This hotel within a hotel is a good choice for those who want really personalized service and beautiful surroundings (the hotel is famous for its beautiful Japanese garden).
## More Information
* Location is crucial in Tokyo, so check our [Where to Stay in Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/where-to-stay-in-tokyo/) page.
* For some more excellent choices, check out [Best Tokyo Boutique Hotels](https://trulytokyo.com/best-tokyo-boutique-hotels/).
* For an overview of Tokyo accommodations, check out [Tokyo Hotels](https://trulytokyo.com/tokyo-hotels/) page.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='64'%20height='0'%20viewBox='0%200%2064%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Map Marker")
### Where Are These Places Located?
See these places on the Truly Tokyo Google map:
* [Open the Tokyo map](https://www.google.com/maps/d/edit?mid=zy8a03W_hbJ0.kyfq6Ra2saKQ&usp=sharing)
* You will see the list of places on the left hand side. (Click the 3-line icon in the top left corner if not). Scroll down or use the map search (the magnifying glass icon) to find the place you want.
* Click the name of the place in the list. Its location pin will be highlighted on the map.
* Map pins are color coded - BLUE: Hotels / Ryokan / Guesthouses | VIOLET: Ryokan | PINK: Places to Eat | GREEN: Shops | YELLOW: Things to See and Do
* If you're using the map on your phone, open the map and then search for the name of the place. The map will then zoom in on its location.
### Tokyo Vacation Checklist
* [ESSENTIALS](https://trulytokyo.com/first-time-in-tokyo/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-01) – For all the essentials in a brief overview, see my [First Time In Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/first-time-in-tokyo/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-02) guide
* [HOTELS](https://www.booking.com/city/jp/tokyo.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Checklist-03) – Check Tokyo accommodation availability and pricing on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/city/jp/tokyo.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Checklist-04) and [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?pcs=1&cid=1743457&city=5085&tag=TT-Checklist-05) - often you can book with no upfront payment and free cancellation
* [WHERE TO STAY](https://trulytokyo.com/where-to-stay-in-tokyo/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-06) – Need tips on where to stay? See my one page guide [Where To Stay In Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/where-to-stay-in-tokyo/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-07)
* [BULLET TRAIN](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/en-US/rails-32/1012-japan/) – You can buy [shinkansen (bullet train) tickets online](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/en-US/rails-32/1012-japan/) from Klook - popular routes include [Tokyo to Kyoto](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/rails-32/1012-japan/route-1305/tokyo-to-kyoto-trains/), [Tokyo to Osaka](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/rails-32/1012-japan/route-1304/tokyo-to-shin-osaka-trains/) and [Tokyo to Hiroshima](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/rails-32/1012-japan/route-1310/tokyo-to-hiroshima-trains/)
* [SIM CARDS](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=877200&k_site=https://www.klook.com/search/result/?query=japan%20esim) – You can [buy an eSim](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=877200&k_site=https://www.klook.com/search/result/?query=japan%20esim) to activate in Japan or [buy a Japan SIM card online](<https://www.getyourguide.com/s/?q=tokyo sim&searchSource=8&partner_id=LAMDN2W&utm_medium=online_publisher&placement=content-middle&cmp=TT-Checklist-08>) for collection on arrival at Tokyo Narita or Haneda airports. Or rent an [unlimited data pocket wifi router](<https://www.getyourguide.com/s/?q=japan wifi&searchSource=7&partner_id=LAMDN2W&utm_medium=online_publisher&placement=content-middle&cmp=TT-Checklist-09>)
* [PACKING LIST](https://insideosaka.com/packing-list-for-japan/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-10) – See my comprehensive [Packing List For Japan](https://insideosaka.com/packing-list-for-japan/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-11)
* [FLIGHTS](https://www.skyscanner.net/g/referrals/v1/flights/cheap-flights-to?adId=1100662&campaignId=13416&destination=tyoa&mediaPartnerId=1924024) – Compare airline flight prices and timings for [the best Japan flight deals](https://www.skyscanner.net/g/referrals/v1/flights/cheap-flights-to?adId=1100662&campaignId=13416&destination=tyoa&mediaPartnerId=1924024). Check my guides to [arriving at Narita Airport](https://trulytokyo.com/arriving-at-tokyos-narita-international-airport/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-12) and [at Haneda Airport](https://trulytokyo.com/arriving-at-tokyo-haneda-international-airport/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-13).
* [JAPAN RAIL PASS](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=1591&aff_adid=616549&k_site=https://www.klook.com/activity/1420-7-day-whole-japan-rail-pass-jr-pass/) – If you're visiting more than one city, you might save money with a [Japan Rail Pass](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=1591&aff_adid=616549&k_site=https://www.klook.com/activity/1420-7-day-whole-japan-rail-pass-jr-pass/) – see if [it's worth it](https://trulytokyo.com/japan-rail-pass-how-to-get-it/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-14) for you
* [TRAVEL INSURANCE](https://www.tkqlhce.com/click-7919142-15371527) – [World Nomads](https://www.tkqlhce.com/click-7919142-15371527) offers simple and flexible travel insurance. Buy at home or while traveling and claim online from anywhere in the world
* [WANT HELP?](https://trulytokyo.com/japan-travel-consulting/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-15) – Do you want help planning your trip? Chris Rowthorn and his team of Japan experts at [Japan Travel Consulting](https://trulytokyo.com/japan-travel-consulting/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-16) can help
### Tokyo District Map
Click a Tokyo District for detailed info on attractions, places to eat and accommodation
